info.name: College Management System
info.description: Complete API collection for the College Management System microservices. All requests go through the API Gateway at http://localhost:8080. Protected endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

request.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token. The test script auto-saves the token to `{{token}}` collection variable.
Blacklists the current JWT token. Requires the Authorization header with Bearer token and X-User-Name header.
Validates whether a JWT token is still active and not blacklisted. Returns true/false.
Initiates the forgot-password flow. Sends an OTP or reset link to the registered email address.
Generates and sends OTP for password reset flow. Requires the reset token returned from the forgot-password step.
Verifies the OTP entered by the user for the password reset flow.

response.name: 410 – OTP Expired

request.description: Resets the password after OTP verification. newPassword and ConfirmPassword must match.

response.name: 400 – Same as old

request.description: Creates a new user. Role must be one of: ADMIN, FACULTY, LIBRARIAN, STUDENT. Faculty-only fields: facultySubRole. Student-only fields: semester, batch, courseCode.

response.name: 400 – Validation error
409 – Duplicate universityId/email

query.description: Optional filter: ADMIN, FACULTY, LIBRARIAN, STUDENT

request.description: Returns all users. Optional ?role= filter. Requires ADMIN role via X-User-Role header.

body.raw:

}

response.name: 400 – Missing required fields

request.description: subRole values: HOD, PROFESSOR, ASSISTANT_PROFESSOR, TRAINEE

response.name: 400 – Validation failed
409 – Already marked

request.description: Returns attendance percentage for a student between two dates.

request.description: Issues a book to a user. userRole: STUDENT, FACULTY, LIBRARIAN
Returns a book using the issue record ID.
Returns system-wide stats: total students, faculty, departments, courses, library stats.
Returns the profile of the currently logged-in user based on X-User-Name, X-User-Role, and universityId headers.
